name: Provencal Pizza Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the olive oil into a clean, dry wine bottle.
2. Add black peppercorns, fresh bay leaves, dried chiles, and fresh thyme branches to the bottle.
3. Cut a 1/4-inch deep, V-shaped channel the length of a wine cork.
4. Use the cork to seal the bottle tightly.
5. Allow the oil to infuse with flavors for 2 to 3 weeks in a cool, dark place.
6. Store the infused oil in a cool, dark place for several months.
Uses: This oil is wonderful sprinkled on almost any pizza, from traditional varieties like quatre fromage or nouveau types like goat cheese with scallops.
